title: triticum aestivum var. erinaceum
intro: Triticum aestivum var. erinaceum, also known as wild spelt or prickly spelt, is a type of ancient cereal grain belonging to the wheat family. The medicinal properties of wild spelt include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation due to its high content of fiber, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of consuming wild spelt include improved digestion, boosted energy levels, and a reduced risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. Wild spelt can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and supplements, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
